overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a character walking through Night City on a sunny day. The character navigates from a wide urban boulevard with elevated transit tracks, turns at a corner with holographic advertisements, crosses an intersection, and walks along an enclosed sidewalk toward a waterfront area.

scene_state.functional_zone: wide urban boulevard with elevated transit infrastructure

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the sidewalk toward an intersection, passing a pedestrian walking in the opposite direction

notable_agents.action: pedestrian with white hair and jacket walking toward the camera on the sidewalk

entered.detail: bright yellow commercial building with large windows and signage
curved elevated transit track structure spanning across the street
tall historic brick building with multiple windows and air conditioning units
massive floating advertisement display showing cyberpunk imagery above the street

segments.scene_description: The character walks along a wide urban sidewalk on a sunny day in Night City. An elevated monorail track curves overhead while a large holographic billboard floats in the distance. The character passes a pedestrian walking toward them as they approach an intersection.

scene_state.functional_zone: building corner with holographic advertisement displays

events.description: character turns right at the corner to face the cross street
character pauses to observe the glowing green holographic advertisement on the building wall

agents.ego_description: turning right at the corner and pausing to look at the holographic displays and street traffic before crossing

entered.detail: large glowing green holographic display projecting on the building wall
massive concrete support column for the building overhang
tall street lamp with distinctive orange accent on the arm

segments.scene_description: The character turns right at the building corner, moving under a concrete overhang. They pause to observe a glowing green holographic advertisement on the wall while vehicles pass on the street. The elevated transit track is now visible to the left as the character prepares to cross.

scene_state.functional_zone: urban intersection crossing into narrow commercial street

events.description: character crosses the street between moving vehicles at the intersection
character briefly runs then resumes walking along the narrow sidewalk

agents.ego_description: crossing the intersection while avoiding traffic, then running briefly before walking along a narrower street with tall buildings on both sides

notable_agents.action: silver car driving through the intersection as the character crosses

entered.detail: tall red concrete wall running along the right side of the sidewalk
futuristic high-rise buildings with unique architecture visible in the distance

segments.scene_description: The character crosses the busy intersection, navigating between vehicles, and enters a narrower urban canyon. The environment becomes more enclosed with a tall red retaining wall on the right and futuristic skyscrapers visible ahead. The character briefly runs before resuming a walking pace.

scene_state.functional_zone: enclosed sidewalk transitioning to waterfront promenade

events.description: view opens up to reveal waterfront, bridge, and body of water as character approaches intersection

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the enclosed sidewalk, passing multiple pedestrians, then approaching the waterfront intersection

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in blue denim jacket and yellow cap walking toward the camera

entered.detail: red street sign with white text reading 'Hanford' mounted on a pole
long bridge structure spanning across the water in the distance
expanse of water visible beyond the street intersection

segments.scene_description: The character walks along a long enclosed sidewalk with a red retaining wall on the right, passing several pedestrians. The street sign 'Hanford' becomes visible as the character approaches an intersection. The scene transitions to reveal a waterfront view with a bridge spanning the water and futuristic skyscrapers visible across the bay.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a bright urban boulevard that gradually narrows into an enclosed corridor before opening onto a wide waterfront vista. It begins on a sunny sidewalk beneath a curving elevated monorail track, moving past pedestrians toward a busy intersection. As the character turns right under a concrete overhang, the view shifts to a glowing green holographic advertisement on the wall while the transit track recedes to the left. The scene then tightens as the character crosses the intersection and enters a narrow urban canyon defined by a tall red retaining wall and towering skyscrapers. Finally, the path follows this enclosed sidewalk past a Hanford street sign before expanding to reveal a bridge spanning the water with a futuristic city skyline across the bay.
